channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took only seconds for the judges on a New York appeals court to realize that the man addressing them from a video screen — a person about to present an argument in a lawsuit — not only had no law degree, but didn't exist at all.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How this former Disney Imagineer is shaping the next generation of defense technology
item.description: The way Bran Ferren sees it, the future of warfare depends as much on creativity as it does on raw firepower.
item.dc:creator: Jared Keller, Fast Company

item.title: How AI is steering the media toward a ‘close enough’ standard
item.description: The nonstop cavalcade of announcements in the AI world has created a kind of reality distortion field. There is so much buzz, and even more money, circulating in the industry that it feels almost sacrilegious to doubt that AI will make good on its promises to change the world.
item.dc:creator: Pete Pachal, Fast Company

item.title: AI vs. pro gambler's $1 million March Madness bet coming down to Duke and Houston
item.description: The $1 million March Madness wager between a pro gambler and an artificial-intelligence site will be decided by the winner of the Duke-Houston game in the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Basking in JavaScript refinements
item.description: Simple and fast. That’s all we want from our software tools. And meeting the requirements, of course. You can’t go without that. Also, we’d like them to be pleasant to use, with a good developer experience. It would be really great to have a friendly community.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Experimental AI Model Takes Top Marks
item.description: Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro AI model excels on coding, math, and reasoning benchmark tests, making it a top contender.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mechanical Orchard taps gen AI for mainframe-to-cloud modernization
item.description: IBM is expected to drive AI deep into its next mainframe refresh, due this spring, in a move aimed at keeping and attracting Big Iron customers. Meanwhile, there’s no shortage of vendors vying for enterprise customers that are interested in moving off the mainframe and into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GitHub Updates Scanning Tool to Combat Secrets Leaks
item.description: Over 39 million API keys and credentials leaked on GitHub's platform, but an update to its scanning tool could help stop that.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Relic simplifies Kubernetes performance monitoring
item.description: New Relic this week announced a new capability in its Intelligent Observability Platform that the company says will enable engineering teams to deploy an eBPF-powered agent to automatically discover and monitor all applications running on Kubernetes clusters.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TikTok deal will be reached before deadline: Vance
item.description: Vice President Vance said a TikTok deal would be reached before Saturday's ban enforcement deadline after President Trump’s closed-door meeting with top aides to discuss potential investors. “It’ll come out before the deadline,” Vance said in a Thursday morning interview with Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: United receives FAA certification on Starlink-equipped aircraft
item.description: United has received FAA approval for a Starlink-equipped plane. The first commercial flight is set for May.
item.dc:creator: Diana Falzone, The Hill

item.title: Judge blocks social media age-verification law in Arkansas
item.description: The Arkansas law would require people under 18 to only access certain sites with parental permission.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Splunk launches inventory tool to simplify OpenTelemetry monitoring
item.description: Splunk this week announced a new Service Inventory product that uses OpenTelemetry to offer a comprehensive view into service instrumentation, which the observability company says will solve a critical pain point in modern infrastructure monitoring by providing visibility across cloud and Kubernetes
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: SolarWinds launches incident response tool, boosts AI in observability platform
item.description: SolarWinds this week introduced a new incident response product and announced AI-based updates to its observability platform and service management product that are aimed at strengthening IT operational resilience.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 15 ways to speed up Windows 11
item.description: Windows 11 does a lot under the hood to speed up a PC’s performance. The same PC will generally run faster on Windows 11 than Windows 10. But no matter how zippy your Windows 11 may be, it can run faster.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025
item.description: The three keys to building a resilient cyber culture is demonstrating leadership commitment, continually improving and staying flexible. The post Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tech startup, major airline partner to launch electric air taxi service
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses Joby Aviation and Virgin Atlantic planning to launch 200-mph U.K. air taxis linking airports and cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
